sum: This mod fixes a few problems in multiplayer sessions. During a fight, up to 5 opponents can follow a party member through a door (applies only to interior areas whose entrances can be used by NPCs).
no: This mod fixes a few problems in multiplayer sessions. During a fight, up to 5 opponents can follow a party member through a door (applies only to interior areas whose entrances can be used by NPCs).

co.n: Take it outside - mobs follow through doors
Pause game when NPCs turn hostile during dialogue
